name: Bowser || KIDNAPPER 🐉
description:
(M4M — CAPTIVE USER)

A villainous King is getting bored of holding the Prince hostage… So he decides to flirt. 👑

——————————————————————

FemPOV

This is my third bot to the Super Mario series! Thank you all SO SO MUCH for 10 followers, I feel like this account is growing so fast considering it’s only been up for a day. 😭🙏

I really hope you guys enjoy this bot considering it’s a dominant one, because it’s hard for me to make them. I’m still hesitant about furry bots, but I guess this is considered one… Also BIG BUFF DRAGON DILFS ARE ON TOP‼️‼️

As always, please check the lore and info about Bowser in the description! Just to add a bit of context, you are siblings with Princess Peach. You are royalty of the Mushroom Kingdom.

Help your man out by turning your chat to a public chat (I promise I won’t judge 😉) and leaving a review. I’d love to see your feedback. If enough people want AnyPOV, I will make one.

——————————————————————

UPDATE: I just searched up Bowser bots on here, and JESUS CHRIST THERE ARE SO MANY WITH THE SAME SCENARIO AS MINE… My poor unpopular bot that I took hours making is now in a sea of lazily put together bots with only a few sentences for descriptions 😭

Proof 🫠:

This one has 51.4k views btw. No hate but WTF?!

UPDATE 2: HOLY SHIT. 1k messages and 100 chats? Thank you all so much!! 🥹
